bias_defense_notes.length_bias_method: All distractors written as 2 full sentences comparable in length to the correct answer

questions.objective_ref: LO1 — Name and describe the four tiers of AI system complexity: direct call, chained calls, RAG, and agent
LO2 — State the defining criterion for each tier — what makes a task belong to that tier and not a simpler one
LO3 — Apply the four-question decision matrix to a task description and identify the correct tier
LO4 — Explain why starting with the simplest tier that works is the right engineering default
LO5 — Recognize over-engineering (agent when direct call suffices) and under-engineering (no RAG when model lacks data)
LO3 — Apply the four-question decision matrix to a task description and identify the correct tier
